message:
fix(glow): suppress deprecated cargo_bin warning

Add #[allow(deprecated)] to the glow_cmd function that uses
assert_cmd::Command::cargo_bin. The function is deprecated in
favor of the cargo_bin_cmd! macro, but still works correctly.
This suppresses the deprecation warning which CI treats as an
error with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
